vBRIEFInfo.description: Scope vBRIEF for AtariTest. Generated by run v0.20.0.

narratives.Overview: A simple demonstration of control of two joysticks controlling different sprites that can shoot in any direction.

items.title: Each joystick controls a single sprite that moves around the screen with accelleration in the direction the joystick is pressed.
Each joystick can independently fire a missile in the direction the joystick is being pressed.
If a direction is not pressed the the joystick won't fire a missile.
Both sprites controlled by joysticks are constrained to the width and height of a standard atari 2600 game.
The missile should visually be a single dot.
A title screen should say TEST GAME in a playfield that is shown when the game is powered on.
Pressing a fire button from either joystick moves from the title screen to the game
Once complete, compile the assembly code with DASM compiler to create an atari BIN rom file.
